name: Burt Collins
abstract: Burton L. Collins (March 27, 1931, New York City – February 23, 2007, Philadelphia) was an American jazz trumpeter.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Palmieri
about_quotes.evidence: Then Randy Brecker with Burt Collins, trumpet. Ronnie Cuber brought him in on baritone... It seems like... I’m going to be very rich if I had an undertaker’s business, because I’ve buried everybody so far...unfortunately. But they always present that incredible recording
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Palmieri — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Hal Espinosa
about_quotes.evidence: in the trumpet section Burt Collins, Ziggy Harrel, Hal Espinosa, and Bill Berry
about_quotes.doc_title: Hal Espinosa interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 20, 2024
